title: HashsSuplosions (HS)
description: v1.4 introduces Flashpoint, fixing bugs and really giving you that explosion effect instead of square explosion holes.

HashsSuplosions Introduces… Flashpoint – v1.4

The Flashpoint Update pushes HashsSuplosions into a new level of visual intensity and explosive realism. Focused on impact, immersion, and refinement, v1.4 transforms every detonation into a more dynamic and believable event.

Explosions now carve out smoother, more natural circular craters, replacing rough terrain damage with shapes that feel powerful and intentional. Combined with the new flash effect, each blast delivers a sharper, more dramatic moment of ignition that emphasizes the raw energy behind every explosion.

This update also improves overall stability and performance, ensuring explosions not only look better, but run more consistently during large-scale destruction.

Key improvements in v1.4:

Circular crater generation for more realistic terrain deformation

New flash effects that enhance the moment of detonation

Bug fixes and performance improvements for smoother gameplay

Every explosion in Flashpoint is designed to feel immediate, forceful, and visually striking. Whether you're testing destructive power, shaping terrain, or creating large-scale blast scenarios, v1.4 ensures each detonation leaves a clearer and more lasting impact.

HashsSuplosions continues to focus on controlled chaos, visual spectacle, and satisfying destruction. With Flashpoint, every ignition matters, and every blast feels stronger than before.
